caption: A grayscale security camera feed captures a dim, industrial-looking indoor space. In the background, a ladder leans against a structure near a long, horizontal object. A bright light source on the right side of the frame illuminates the area. Throughout the sequence, a small, bright point of light moves across the center of the scene, appearing to glide from left to right. Each frame contains on-screen text in the bottom-left corner that reads "Cam 04". Along the top edge of the images, timestamps indicate the progression of time: "05-13-2022 11:34:16PM", "05-13-2022 11:34:21PM", "05-13-2022 11:34:26PM", and "05-13-2022 11:34:31PM". No people are visible in the scene, and the only significant change between the frames is the shifting position of the small, luminous object moving across the floor.
